Pool.title: Pool Points
Pool.hint: The total number of points available to spend. Standard is 27 and heroic is 35.

PointCosts.hint: Set the cost to increase to the score from the lower value. Set to -1 if you do not allow that score.

PBCalculator.title: Point Buy Calculator
PBCalculator.adjustHint: Use the Up and Down keys to change the scores one at a time
